results.recommendedTool: Find your cheapest viable AI setup
alternatives: • You’re paying for GPT-4o, Claude, or a subscription and want a cheaper equivalent.
• You need a fast estimate before choosing between API and subscription plans.
• You want one clear next step after seeing your projected monthly spend.
results.explanation: $ OverpayingForAI Calculator Decision Engine Comparisons AI Types Resources Calculate Cost Find your cheapest viable AI setup Estimate your real monthly AI spend and immediately see lower-cost alternatives. Recommendations are based on use case, usage level, and cost sensitivity.
results.resultText: $ OverpayingForAI Calculator Decision Engine Comparisons AI Types Resources Calculate Cost Find your cheapest viable AI setup Estimate your real monthly AI spend and immediately see lower-cost alternatives. Recommendations are based on use case, usage level, and cost sensitivity. USE THIS IF… • You’re paying for GPT-4o, Claude, or a subscription and want a cheaper equivalent. • You need a fast estimate before choosing between API and subscription plans. • You want one clear next step after seeing your projected monthly spend. Start with a common usage scenario Pick a preset to prefill the calculator. Solo Founder Lean daily usage for shipping, support, and planning. LEAN STARTUP Startup Support Bot High-volume support and FAQ automation. AUTOMATION SUPPORT Developer Coding Workflow Coding, refactoring, and debugging with balanced quality. CODING DAILY Content Team Writing-heavy workflow for briefs, drafts, and edits. WRITING TEAM Usage Preset Light (chat, occasional) Moderate (daily use) Heavy (power user) Scale (building products) AI Model GPT-4o — OpenAI GPT-4o Mini — OpenAI Claude 3.5 Sonnet — Anthropic Claude 3.5 Haiku — Anthropic Gemini 1.5 Pro — Google Gemini 1.5 Flash — Google Mistral Large — Mistral Mistral Small — Mistral Llama 3.1 70B — Meta (self-hosted) DeepSeek V3 — DeepSeek Groq (Llama 3.1 70B) — Groq GPT-4 Turbo — OpenAI o3 — OpenAI o3-mini — OpenAI Claude 3 Opus — Anthropic Claude 3 Haiku — Anthropic Gemini 2.5 Pro — Google Gemini 2.5 Flash — Google Codestral — Mistral DeepSeek R1 — DeepSeek DeepSeek Coder V2 — DeepSeek Grok 4 — xAI Grok 4 Fast — xAI Command R+ — Cohere Llama 3.1 Instruct 70B — Meta Qwen Coder — Alibaba Qwen General — Alibaba ChatGPT Plus — OpenAI ChatGPT Free — OpenAI Claude Pro — Anthropic Google One AI Premium — Google Gemini Free — Google Cursor Pro — Cursor Cursor Free — Cursor Perplexity Pro — Perplexity GitHub Copilot Free — GitHub/Microsoft Writesonic — Writesonic Jasper — Jasper AI Copy.ai — Copy.ai Rytr — Rytr Pricing data last reviewed 1 week ago Monthly Input Tokens 5K tokens · ~3,750 words Monthly Output Tokens 1K tokens · ~750 words Calculate Monthly Cost How are costs calculated? API costs are calculated as: (input tokens / 1000 × input cost per 1K) + (output tokens / 1000 × output cost per 1K). Subscription costs are flat monthly fees regardless of usage. 1 token ≈ 0.75 words ≈ 4 characters of English text. Learn more about tokens → Often 10× cheaper than GPT-4o for the same output Most content and coding tasks cost under $1/month with DeepSeek V3 via API. Try DeepSeek V3 → COMPARE MODELS Best AI Tools by Value GPT-4o vs GPT-4o mini Claude vs GPT-4o DeepSeek vs GPT-4o Not sure which AI is cheapest for your use case? Find out in 30 seconds — no signup required.
